item.title: Exploring Generators and Coroutines
item.dc:creator: Mariano Anaya
item.description:
LeôÙt's reôÙviôÙsit the idea of geôÙneôÙraôÙtors in PyôÙthoôÙn, in orôÙder to unôÙdersôÙtanôÙd how the suôÙpport for coôÙrouôÙtiôÙnes was achieôÙved in laôÙtest verôÙsions of PyôÙthon (3.6, at the tiôÙme of this wriôÙtinôÙg).

By reôÙviewing the miôÙlesôÙtoôÙnes on geôÙneôÙraôÙtorôÙs, chôÙroôÙnoôÙloôÙgiôÙcaôÙllôÙy, we can get a beôÙtteôÙr iôÙdea of the evoôÙluôÙtion that lead to asôÙynôÙchôÙroôÙnous proôÙgraôÙmôÙming in PyôÙthoôÙn.

We wiôÙll reôÙview the main chanôÙges in PyôÙthon that reôÙlaôÙte to geôÙneôÙraôÙtors anôÙd aôÙsôÙynôÙchôÙroôÙnous proôÙgraôÙmôÙminôÙg, starôÙting wiôÙth PEôÙP-255 (SimôÙple GeôÙneôÙraôÙtorôÙs), PEôÙP-342 (ôÙCoôÙrouôÙtiôÙnes via EnhanôÙced GeôÙneôÙraôÙtorôÙs), PEôÙP-380 (SôÙynôÙtax for deôÙleôÙgaôÙting to a ôÙSuôÙb-ôÙGeôÙneôÙraôÙtoôÙr), and fiôÙnisôÙhing wiôÙth PEôÙP-525 (AôÙsôÙynôÙchôÙroôÙnous GeôÙneôÙraôÙtorôÙs).

Leer mûÀsãÎ (quedan 16 minutos de lectura)
